title: Cobblemon: Beyond the Limit
description: Adds evolutions for Pokémon that go beyond their natural endpoint.
body:
This addon is made to reimagine pokémon designs that could be taken one step further than they have been, providing an extra evolution to some pokémon in evolution lines that should have naturally concluded already.

**Currently Implemented:**
- Gorochu
- Porygon 3

**Planned for Future Updates:**
- Yangiga
- Brutaligatr
- Eternape
- Rejuvicanth

Each new evolution will be given a suitable signature ability and aims to improve upon the previous "final evolution" of the line.

**Gorochu** is obtained by evolving a Raichu. This is done by giving your Raichu a flame orb to hold at level 91 or higher. Gorochu's signature ability, _Searing Voltage_, allows it to absorb some of the energy from opposing pokémon's electric and fire type attacks, using the absorbed power to charge its electric type moves for extra damage.

**Porygon 3** is obtained by evolving a Porygon-Z. This is done by giving Porygon-Z a pokedex to hold at level 85 or higher.
